title: Reorder List
description: Sắp xếp lại list L0→L1→…→Ln thành L0→Ln→L1→Ln-1→… Chỉ sửa con trỏ, không copy node.
approach: 1) Tìm giữa (slow/fast). 2) Đảo nửa sau. 3) Merge xen kẽ hai nửa (lấy từ đầu nửa 1, rồi đầu nửa 2).

solutions.python:
class Solution:
    def reorderList(self, head: Optional[ListNode]) -> None:
        if not head or not head.next:
            return
        slow, fast = head, head.next
        while fast and fast.next:
            slow = slow.next
            fast = fast.next.next
        second = slow.next
        slow.next = None
        prev = None
        while second:
            nxt = second.next
            second.next = prev
            prev = second
            second = nxt
        first, second = head, prev
        while second:
            t1, t2 = first.next, second.next
            first.next = second
            second.next = t1
            first, second = t1, t2
solutions.c: /* Tìm mid, reverse, merge xen — xem C++ */

analysis.correctness: Cắt đôi, đảo nửa sau, ghép xen đúng thứ tự L0,Ln,L1,…
